title: 151 Frame Sealant - for All UPVC, Wood & Metal Door & Window Frames | Permanent & Fast Drying - Suitable for Internal Use Only (Brown, 280ml)
features: PERFECT FOR INDOOR SEALING JOBS: Designed for internal use, these frame sealants are ideal for tackling draughts, gaps, and trims around door and window frames throughout the home.
SUITABLE FOR MOST FRAME TYPES: Whether working with UPVC, wood, or metal, these window sealants bond securely for a flexible, durable seal around any internal frame.
FAST DRYING FORMULA: The quick-drying acrylic base allows for easy smoothing and faster project completion—perfect when freshening up a room or finishing DIY renovations.
LONG-LASTING FLEXIBLE SEAL: Once cured, these sealants stay permanently flexible to absorb movement and prevent cracking—ideal for areas prone to shifting or subtle expansion.
APPLICATION NOZZLE INCLUDED: Each cartridge comes with a handy nozzle, making it easy to apply an even bead along frame edges, trims or joints for a professional-looking finish.
BLENDS WITH BROWN FRAMES: The brown tone makes these frame sealants ideal for matching with darker window frames, wooden trims, or richly painted skirting boards.
NO SANDING REQUIRED: Once applied, the smooth finish can be left as is or painted over when dry, saving time on prep and helping to keep projects moving.
COVERS UP TO 13.5 METRES: Each 280ml cartridge provides generous coverage, making it great for sealing multiple frames or completing jobs throughout the entire home.
EASY CLEAN-UP AND STORAGE: Any excess can be wiped away with a damp cloth before curing, and the cartridge stores easily in a cool, dry place between uses.
RELIABLE ACRYLIC PERFORMANCE: Made from high-quality acrylic polymer, this frame and window sealant provides a durable, strong seal that won’t shrink or crack with time.
description: 151Frame Sealant, for all brown UPVC, wood & metal window frames and doors. Easy to use, fast drying. Brown flexible acrylic based sealant, fits standard DIY cartridge caulking guns. Ready to use Frame Acrylic Sealant.Colour : Brown. Size: 310ml. Store at room temperature
